# First Agentic AI with Model Context Protocol

Abhishek Jain

Abhishek Jain
6 min read
·Jul 19, 2025


--

Share
You’ve probably chatted with an AI. You ask a question, it gives you an answer. But what if you could ask an AI to*do*something? Not just tell you*how*to do it, but to actually perform a multi-step task in the real world?
“Calculate 5 times 20 and write the answer to a file named ‘result.txt’.”
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Working Demo Example for Chosen Task
This is the world of**Agentic AI**. It’s about moving from a passive AI that just answers questions to an active AI “agent” that ca

targeted_qa.projects:
Abishek has been involved in several notable technical projects and products, particularly in the fields of simulation, digital engineering, and software development. One prominent project is with BQP, where the company has achieved significant milestones such as a 25x speed-up with BQPhy’s QA-PINN for accelerated CFD training and a milestone in quantum circuit compression with NVIDIA and Classiq, setting a new standard in quantum computational fluid dynamics (QCFD) ([source](https://www.bqpsim.com/press/bqp-featured-in-expert-predictions-for-startup-trends-in-2026)). Additionally, Abishek is the founding engineer at Calyb AI, where he is working on building AI-driven solutions using technologies like Next.js, Python, and cloud platforms to automate workflows and enhance AI applications ([source](https://theabhishek.me/)). 

Furthermore, he has been recognized for his influence in AI, notably being listed among the most influential people in AI in 2025, which underscores his contributions to AI infrastructure and innovation, particularly in India through the IndiaAI Mission, which aims to democratize AI access and support startups ([source](https://time.com/collections/time100-ai-2025/7305885/abhishek-singh)). His work spans from software engineering and architecture to AI automation and digital transformation projects, making him a notable figure in the tech industry today.
targeted_qa.expertise:
Abishek's core technical skills and areas of expertise span several domains within software engineering and related fields. Based on recent LinkedIn posts and profiles, he has strong proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Go, Bash, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and React, with Python being particularly emphasized as essential for AI/ML roles ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/abhishek-ingle_2026-tech-skills-market-analysis-swe-vs-activity-7429525237190311936-mdzC); [Abhishek Kumar](https://www.abishekb.com)). In addition, he has expertise in cloud solutions and architecture, web and app development, data and analytics, and digital marketing ([Abhishek B](https://www.abishekb.com)).

Furthermore, Abishek has experience with AI/ML frameworks, notably PyTorch, which has overtaken TensorFlow as the preferred framework for many in the field ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/abhishek-ingle_2026-tech-skills-market-analysis-swe-vs-activity-7429525237190311936-mdzC)). His skills also include working with microcontrollers, communication protocols, embedded C programming, RTOS, IoT, and debugging, indicating a broad expertise in embedded systems ([Abhishek Kumar](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/abhishek-kumar-1a428b170_top-10-skills-every-embedded-engineer-must-activity-7422656676308377601-2ivv)). 

Overall, Abishek's technical profile covers software development, AI/ML, embedded systems, cloud architecture, and data analytics, making him a versatile engineer with a focus on modern, high-demand technologies ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/abhishek-ingle_2026-tech-skills-market-analysis-swe-vs-activity-7429525237190311936-mdzC); [Abhishek Kumar](https://www.abishekb.com)).
targeted_qa.impact:
Abishek Vedamoorthy has achieved significant impact in his career as a Lead Technical Product Manager at Google, where he focuses on ChromeOS Kernel Health and performance initiatives. His role involves leading cross-functional teams to develop innovative software solutions, with a track record of reducing development times and improving productivity across multiple projects ([theorg.com](https://theorg.com/org/google/org-chart/abishek-vedamoorthy)). 

Additionally, Abishek Viswanathan has made notable contributions as a product executive, having scaled product and platform teams at Qualtrics from a $170 million business to over $1 billion in annual recurring revenue, demonstrating substantial growth and strategic leadership ([clay.earth](https://clay.earth/profile/abishek-viswanathan)). His leadership roles in various companies reflect a strong record of driving product strategies, scaling businesses, and leading high-growth initiatives ([LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/abishekv)). 

While specific measurable achievements such as awards or quantitative impacts are not detailed in the search results, these leadership roles and contributions to major projects highlight his significant professional impact.
targeted_qa.personality:
Based on the available search results, Abishek communicates online primarily through professional and technical platforms such as LinkedIn, where the tone appears to be formal, informative, and focused on sharing insights about sound-based payments and technological innovations ([Result 1](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/tonetag_exclusive-qa-with-kumar-abhishek-founder-activity-7124605115541458944-iqFj)). His tone in such contexts tends to be serious and professional, aimed at conveying expertise and engaging with a business-oriented audience.

Additionally, his online presence, particularly on platforms like Stack Exchange, suggests a technical and academic tone, characterized by detailed, knowledgeable responses to programming and engineering questions ([Result 4](https://stackoverflow.com/users/3680606/abhishek)). This indicates that Abishek’s communication style in technical environments is precise, informative, and focused on clarity, often adopting a formal or educational tone.

Overall, Abishek’s online communication tends toward a professional, technical, and informative tone, emphasizing clarity and expertise. It is less casual or humorous and more aligned with technical and business contexts, aiming to share knowledge and insights effectively ([Result 2](https://www.academia.edu/39093581/Style_and_tone-1_Communication_Skill_)).
targeted_qa.aesthetics:
Based on the available online presence and portfolio of Abishek, it appears that they do demonstrate a clear sense of visual design taste, aesthetic preferences, and creative sensibility. Their personal portfolio highlights a passion for transforming complex challenges into engaging and thoughtful design solutions, indicating an appreciation for innovative and user-centered aesthetics ([abisheik.framer.website](https://abisheik.framer.website)). Additionally, Abishek’s work as a product designer and their contributions to platforms like Medium show an interest in exploring how visual elements, such as shapes, influence user psychology, further reflecting a refined aesthetic sensibility ([medium.com](https://medium.com/@designwithabishek/how-shapes-as-psychological-impacts-on-users-and-on-your-product-635627143c35)).

Furthermore, their professional profiles and projects reveal a blend of creativity, storytelling, and attention to visual detail, whether in mobile/web products or branding initiatives. Abishek’s engagement with various design platforms and their emphasis on building memorable, engaging experiences suggest a strong aesthetic judgment and creative sensibility that informs their work ([abhishek.ca](https://abishek.ca/about-abishek), [abhishekdesigns.in](https://www.abhishekdesigns.in/cv)). Overall, their online presence and portfolio indicate that they do show a developed sense of visual taste and creative flair.
